item.title: Things I will miss
item.description:
My mom doesn't know how to send memes in a text message so when she finds one and thinks of me she emails it to herself puts it in a word document and takes a picture of it to send to me.
I absolutely love it. I haven't taught her how to send it directly to me because I love it so much.
Honestly don't think memes would be a thing if we all had to do that.
I will really miss getting these memes when she is gone. (She is 71) Fp edit. Wow my mom is internet famous nice. I called her and read all the comments to her. You guys made her smile and laugh and definitely made her concerned on what I'm doing in my free time. I never been on the front page. I know not your customs but I have seen people ask for things. So I guess give your mom a call or if you're adopted like me call whoever is your nom
item.dc:creator: necola

item.title: Pencil and charcoal art
item.description:
I’m excited to share a few of my newest drawings with you! This one of Lady Gaga, done in graphite and white pencil, is one of my favorites EVER.
This guy is a little less well-known but no less beautiful! He plays Alfie in the new season of Emily in Paris. I saw this photo and just had to draw it. The rose and pose were just too lovely. Added some pink pencil for a splash of color.
My first foray into charcoal in a looong time. Wanted to capture the vintage look of this photo, which I believe was taken of Johnny Cash during his performance at Folsom Prison. Follow me on IG @sonjartsinger for more!
item.dc:creator: sonjartsinger

item.title: Stunning image of Jupiter taken by NASA's Juno Spacecraft on December 16, 2017
item.description: The solar system's largest and smallest planets will be in alignment this Friday. In the morning, Mercury and Jupiter will be in conjunction and appear just above the horizon, according to NASA. A conjunction is when two objects appear close together in the sky, but they can actually be millions of miles apart, according to Thomas Beatty, assistant astronomer at Steward Observatory at the University of Arizona in Tucson. It's similar to a merry-go-round, he said, with certain animals aligning as they circle around the center of the ride. To the naked eye, the planets will look like two bright stars, Beatty said. The best time to view the conjunction is in the early morning hours, but it might be difficult to see in the Northern Hemisphere, according to EarthSky. The views will be much better in the Southern Hemisphere due to Earth's angle in the sky. https://www.cnn.com/2021/03/04/world/mercury-jupiter-conjunction-apophis-scn/index.html?utm_term=link&utm_c
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: We were never free
item.description: There is no nursing shortage. Only greedy hospitals that purposely understaff to boost profits. Nurses should not be caring for more than 3-4 patients ever. It is dangerous for the patient and nurses. For every extra patient a nurse is assigned, the likelihood of one of her patients dying goes up 7%. The secret hospitals don't want you to know is that there has never been more registered nurses in America. They just weren't hiring them. We want to care for our patients but we want to do it safely. Right now hospitals are not doing everything they can to save the lives of your friends and family. Support nursing unions!
item.dc:creator: mmmmaybenot
